title: 19-3-1-1 Stated Price Net of Rebate - Canada.ca
content:
## 19-3-1-1 Stated Price Net of Rebate

## Notice to the reader
The GST/HST rates referenced in this publication are those that were in effect at the time of publishing. For the list of all applicable GST/HST rates (current and historic), go to GST/HST calculator (and rates) .

## Proposed - GST relief for first-time home buyers on new homes
This publication has not been updated to reflect the proposed legislation introduced in Bill C-4, regarding the GST relief for first-time home buyers on new homes valued up to $1.5 million.
For further information, go to GST/HST new housing rebate .
You can view this publication in:
HTML 19-3-1-1-e.html
Last update: 2006-08-22

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
